name: less-toil
description: LessToil — 40-module structural intelligence platform for Claude Code. Indexes codebases into a persistent SQLite knowledge graph (26 tables) across 56 languages (41 tree-sitter + 15 regex fallback). Builds weighted call graphs with static and dynamic edge tracking. Infers 14 architectural domains with security boundary marking. Enforces architectural governance via SQL invariants and threshold policies with a 6-verifier consensus engine. Runs a 10-phase verification pipeline before every edit (PLAN > SIMULATE > VERIFY > CONSTRAIN > EXECUTE > TEST > TRACE > SCORE > REPAIR > REVERIFY). Detects duplicated code via SimHash 64-bit fingerprinting. Analyzes git history for temporal risk scoring (churn, bug density, ownership volatility). Tracks architectural drift across 4 axes with persistent scores. Runs 6-category autonomous stewardship scans. Implements a self-healing loop (Detect > Propose > Validate > Repair) with a repository immune system. Provides 18 advanced intelligence modules: epistemic evidence tracking, long-horizon forecasting (1x-10x scale), semantic compression, economic cost modeling, cognitive load analysis, design intent preservation, adversarial robustness, knowledge decay detection, operational sovereignty, reality alignment, meta-reasoning, toolchain auditing, refactor scoring, and more. Incrementally reindexes changed files after every edit (< 1 second per file) with a confidence feedback loop. Exports unified weighted multi-edge graphs (JSON + DOT) merging AST, type, runtime, profiling, and temporal data. Installs in under 60 seconds with zero configuration required.
